Want to Start Vibe Coding? The Fundamentals Beginners Should Get Down First

Lately a lot of friends have been asking me, "I want to use AI to build things too — where do I start?" And what they're really asking about is Vibe Coding. This post is about the fundamentals beginners should get down before diving into Vibe Coding — Git, command line, UI Frameworks, and so on. So you don't get halfway through and find you're stuck not knowing how to communicate with the AI.
